Name: Jasper WAR Events
Description: General-purpose Warrior event profile for PvE. Keeps staggered dungeon mitigation around the 80 percent pressure point, proactive AoE-pack Bloodwhetting/Raw Intuition recovery, earlier Equilibrium sustain, pack-focused Thrill/Shake recovery, emergency Holmgang support, MT/OT stance controls, wipe/zone reset scaffolding, raidwide/tankbuster mitigation, Interject utility, aggressive spender-toggle safety to reduce Beast Gauge overcap, and optional co-tank support. ForceAOE is manual-only; this profile does not reset it. Safety helpers stay active while the quick-toggle bar is kept compact for normal play.

Events.Name: Emergency Holmgang
Events.Description: Uses Holmgang before lethal low-HP windows.

Events.Name: 2 Mit <= 65% HP, >= 3 mobs
Events.Description: Adds a second mitigation layer only once a large pull is still pressuring HP, keeping mitigation staggered.

Events.Name: 1 Mit <= 80% HP, >= 3 mobs
Events.Description: Starts dungeon mitigation around 80 percent HP on three-or-more enemy pulls, leaving room to stagger tools.

Events.Name: Boss Cooldown Hold
Events.Description: At low boss HP, saves major damage cooldowns for the next pull or boss. Optional dungeon-routing helper; leave it off for normal play.

Events.Name: Pack Cooldown Hold
Events.Description: When a trash pack is nearly dead, saves major damage cooldowns for the next pull or boss. Optional dungeon-routing helper; leave it off for normal play.

Events.Name: Last Boss
Events.Description: Enables burn boss at 5% hp.

Events.Name: Auto Buddymit
Events.Description: Optional co-tank support using Nascent Flash. Disabled by default; enable when you want buddy mitigation support.

Events.Name: Bloodwhetting / Raw Intuition
Events.Description: Uses Bloodwhetting or Raw Intuition proactively around 90 percent HP on 3+ enemy AoE packs.

Events.Name: Release Cooldown Hold
Events.Description: Releases Save CD once the current target is above end-of-pack/end-of-boss range.

Events.Name: Equilibrium Recovery
Events.Description: Uses Equilibrium around 70 percent HP as an oGCD recovery layer before emergency windows.

Events.Name: [OnWipe] Stance OT
Events.Description: Optional off-tank stance release. Disabled by default.

Events.Name: Interject Interrupt
Events.Description: Uses Interject on interruptible enemy casts in range.

Events.Name: Reprisal Mobs
Events.Description: Uses Reprisal in large dungeon pulls when it is not already active.

Events.Name: Arm's Length, >= 3 mobs
Events.Description: Uses Arm's Length on normal dungeon-size pulls when standing still and targets will live long enough.

Events.Name: Sprint OOC
Events.Description: Optional out-of-combat Sprint quality-of-life toggle. Disabled by default.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles
Events.Description: Restores normal Warrior ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Zone Change
Events.Description: Restores default Warrior toggles after zone changes.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Wipe
Events.Description: Restores default Warrior toggles after wipes.

Events.Name: Nascent Flash Lowest
Events.Description: Optional Nascent Flash support for the lowest-health party member around 50 percent HP.

Events.Name: [OnWipe] Stance MT
Events.Description: Main-tank stance setup for dungeons and roulettes.

Events.Name: Stance MT Zone Change
Events.Description: Restores main-tank stance setup after zone changes.

Events.Name: Thrill Pack Recovery
Events.Description: Uses Thrill of Battle around 70 percent HP as a pack-sustain layer on 3+ enemy pulls.

Events.Name: Shake Pack Recovery
Events.Description: Uses Shake It Off around 65 percent HP as a pack-sustain shield on 3+ enemy pulls.

Events.Name: Spender Toggle Safety
Events.Description: Keeps Warrior spender toggles enabled in combat so Beast Gauge and primal spenders do not sit unused.

Events.Name: AoE Pack Spender Release
Events.Description: Turns Save CD and Save 1 Jump off, then re-enables spender toggles during three-or-more enemy pulls.

Conditions.Name: [Target] HP >= 45%
Conditions.Description: Releases cooldown holds once the current target is no longer in end-of-pack/end-of-boss range.

Conditions.Name: Auto Buddymit
Conditions.Description: Condition requiring tank partner to be in combat with you.

Conditions.Name: Bloodwhetting Pack <= 90%
Conditions.Description: AoE-pack HP threshold for proactive Bloodwhetting or Raw Intuition.

Conditions.Name: Does not have Thrill of Battle

SubConditions.Name: Does not have Thrill of Battle

Logics.Name: Emergency Holmgang
Logics.Description: Uses Holmgang around 30 percent HP before lethal low-HP windows.

Logics.Name: Release Cooldown Hold
Logics.Description: Releases Save CD once the current target is above end-of-pack/end-of-boss range, so Warrior resumes spending before gauge overcaps.

Logics.Name: Bloodwhetting / Raw Intuition
Logics.Description: Uses Bloodwhetting or Raw Intuition proactively around 90 percent HP on 3+ enemy AoE packs, without blocking on the current target HP.

Logics.Name: Equilibrium Recovery
Logics.Description: Uses Equilibrium around 70 percent HP as an oGCD recovery layer before emergency windows.

Logics.Name: Stance OT
Logics.Description: Optional off-tank stance release. Disabled by default.

Logics.Name: Interject Interrupt
Logics.Description: Uses Interject on interruptible enemy casts in range.

Logics.Name: Reprisal Mobs
Logics.Description: Uses Reprisal in large dungeon pulls when it is not already active.

Logics.Name: Arm's Length Mitigation
Logics.Description: Arm's Length on three-or-more enemy pulls

Logics.Name: Sprint OOC
Logics.Description: Optional out-of-combat Sprint quality-of-life toggle. Disabled by default.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Restores normal Warrior ACR toggles while safely out of combat. Regular UseAOE stays enabled; ForceAOE is manual-only and is never changed by this profile.

Logics.Name: Nascent Flash Lowest
Logics.Description: Optional Nascent Flash support for the lowest-health party member around 50 percent HP.

Logics.Name: Stance MT
Logics.Description: Main-tank stance setup for dungeons and roulettes.

Logics.Name: Thrill Pack Recovery
Logics.Description: Uses Thrill of Battle around 70 percent HP as a pack-sustain layer on 3+ enemy pulls, avoiding unnecessary boss/TB overlap.

Logics.Name: Shake Pack Recovery
Logics.Description: Uses Shake It Off around 65 percent HP as a pack-sustain shield on 3+ enemy pulls, avoiding unnecessary boss/TB overlap.

Logics.Name: Spender Toggle Safety
Logics.Description: Keeps Warrior spender toggles enabled in combat and disables Save 1 Jump so Beast Gauge and primal spenders do not sit unused, even if the local ACR bar was left in a bad state.

Logics.Name: AoE Pack Spender Release
Logics.Description: Turns Save CD and Save 1 Jump off during three-or-more enemy pulls, then re-enables Warrior spender toggles so Beast Gauge and primal spenders do not sit unused through trash packs.

Items.Name: Boss Hold
Items.Description: Optional dungeon-routing helper that saves major damage cooldowns near the end of a boss. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Pack Hold
Items.Description: Optional dungeon-routing helper that saves major damage cooldowns when a trash pack is nearly dead. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Last Boss
Items.Description: Enables burn boss at 5 percent HP boss health. Enable this for the last boss of a dungeon, or for any trial/raid with only one phase.

Items.Name: Opener
Items.Description: Optional automatic opener reset support after wipes.

Items.Name: Stun/Int
Items.Description: Uses Low Blow and Interject for roulette-safe dungeon utility.

Items.Name: Buddy Mit
Items.Description: Optional Nascent Flash co-tank/ally support. Leave off when you want Bloodwhetting reserved for yourself.

Items.Name: MT Stance
Items.Description: Main-tank stance setup for dungeons and roulettes.

Items.Name: OT Stance
Items.Description: Will manage stance automatically for Off-Tanks in raids. Enable stance in the end of your opener to use this effectively.
